Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}'Sup, dude? Wanna grab a bite at Hagakure?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I haven't had their special in a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Wai— Hold up, I ain't made outta money! I'm just a poor, broke high school kid here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}C'mon, man, we're buds, right? We even bonded while playing catch and everything, riiight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Er... Guess we never actually got around to that, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Aw, c'mon! Don't give me the cold shoulder, man![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}We're buds, right? We even bonded while playing catch and everything, riiight?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Er... Guess we never actually got around to that, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}'Sup, dude? Wanna grab a bite at Hagakure?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}I haven't had their special in a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Hold up, I ain't made outta money! I'm just a poor, broke high school kid here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}C'mon, we're buds, right? Just two pals dreamin' about being superheroes someday?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}Yeahhh... Those were some real good times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}Aw, c'mon! Don't give me the cold shoulder, man![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}We're buds, right? Just two pals dreamin' about being superheroes someday?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}Yeahhh... Those were some real good times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}Hey, something's been buggin' me for a while now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 18 0 0}That seat's been empty this whole time. Who even sits there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 19 0 0}Yeah, I know, I know. You don't remember either, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 20 0 0}But, dude, this is driving me crazy. I'm seriously gonna lose all my marbles before the end of the school year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 21 0 0}You don't remember either, huh? Seriously, who the heck sat there?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 22 0 0}Gah, this is driving me crazy. I'm gonna lose all my marbles before the end of the school year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 23 0 0}Well, anyways... Hear me out for a bit?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 24 0 0}I got called in to Ms. Toriumi's office again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 25 0 0}She asked me what I was planning to do after April. Dude, like I know![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 26 0 0}And I was tryna play it off, but then she got all worked up and gave me one hell of a lecture...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 27 0 0}Is it just me, or has she gotten way more serious than before?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 28 0 0}Tomochika was sayin' that you can't even bribe her with cake anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 29 0 0}Oh hey, didja hear from Tomochika about the new teachers coming in April? Apparently, they're all women.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 30 0 0}You have no idea how stoked he was. Honestly, I was getting major secondhand embarrassment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 31 0 0}Well, none of that really matters to me. I already got a special someone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 34 0 0}I... did have a special someone, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 36 0 0}I-I'm not making this up or anything! I wouldn't tell such a pathetic lie to try and look cool![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 37 0 0}I just thought that... that there was someone special in my life...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 39 0 0}Have I... forgotten something important? Something I never should've forgotten...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 41 0 0}Sorry, man... I think I'll pass on the ramen, actually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 45 0 0}But... I feel like it's something I shouldn't have forgotten.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 46 0 0}Well, I guess a lot's happened this year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 47 0 0}I'm a bit fuzzy on the details, but I just know it was jam-packed with all sorts of thrills and chills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 48 0 0}Weird though... If it was that exciting, why can't I remember anything?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 49 0 0}I dunno, man. Feels like my head's a right mess thinking about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 50 0 0}Dude, what the hell did we even do this entire year?[n]{f 1 1}
